de.fhdwhannover.integrea.ga.core.ChromosomePair

Packages, die ChromosomePair verwenden
Package
Beschreibung
de.fhdwhannover.integrea.ga.core.crossover
Contains implementations of the Crossover operator for the Darwinian Engine.

  • Verwendungen von ChromosomePair in de.fhdwhannover.integrea.ga.core.crossover

    Methoden in de.fhdwhannover.integrea.ga.core.crossover, die ChromosomePair zurückgeben
    Modifikator und Typ
    Methode
    Beschreibung
    ChromosomePair<T>
    Crossover.crossover(ChromosomePair<T> pair)
    Executes a specific recombination algorithm on a pair of parent chromosomes.
    ChromosomePair<T>
    CycleCrossover.crossover(ChromosomePair<T> pair)
     
    ChromosomePair<T>
    OnePointCrossover.crossover(ChromosomePair<T> pair)
    Performs one‑point crossover on the given parent pair.
    ChromosomePair<T>
    OrderedCrossover.crossover(ChromosomePair<T> pair)
    Performs ordered crossover on the given parent pair.
    ChromosomePair<SymRegNode>
    SubtreeCrossover.crossover(ChromosomePair<SymRegNode> parents)
     
    ChromosomePair<Integer>
    SudokuBlockCrossover.crossover(ChromosomePair<Integer> pair)
     
    ChromosomePair<T>
    TwoPointCrossover.crossover(ChromosomePair<T> pair)
    Performs two‑point crossover on the given parent pair.
    ChromosomePair<T>
    UniformCrossover.crossover(ChromosomePair<T> pair)
    Performs uniform crossover on the given parent pair.
